description:
Reorganize fixtures/ to one directory per fixture, mirroring the existing fixtures/errors/<name>/ convention.

Layout:
  fixtures/<name>/
    README.md       frontmatter (purpose/paths/kind/defer/expect_clif_*) + narrative
    input.fz        pure source — header comments removed
    expected.txt    stdout golden       (was <name>.expected)
    expected.clif   CLIF golden if any  (was <name>.clif)
    expected.specs  specs golden if any (was <name>.specs)

Touchpoints:
- tests/fixture_matrix.rs: discover() walks dirs; check() reads expected.txt; parse_header() reads README.md frontmatter; GOLDEN_FIXTURES entries lose .fz; ~15 hardcoded fixture paths rewrite to fixtures/<name>/input.fz; fixture_index_up_to_date emits dir entries.
- src/runtime.rs:571: concurrency_ping_pong path.
- src/ir_interp.rs:9: comment-only reference.
- src/diag/render.rs: already walks errors/<dir>/, no change.

Frontmatter shape (YAML):
---
purpose: one-line statement
paths: [jit, interp]
kind: run
expect_clif_excludes:
  - fn: add1_s2
    substr: ishl_imm
---

# add1
Narrative body — what / why.

expect_clif_* directives stay in frontmatter for this ticket. Retired in .22.19 after .22.18 proves golden coverage subsumes them.

Invariants:
- 539 tests green before and after
- fixture_index_up_to_date passes (BLESS as needed in same commit)
- golden_clif / golden_specs pass against the 5 existing goldens at new paths
- fixtures/errors/ untouched

Single commit, mechanical.
title: fz-ul4.27.22.17: fixtures — per-dir layout + README extraction
